hero.title: Destination Paradise
hero.description: Plan Zanzibar and Tanzania in one place: complete safari-and-beach packages, island excursions, mainland safaris, and an AI planner that helps shape the right route.

rooted.title: Locally rooted
rooted.text: Guides who grew up between Zanzibar's alleys and the Tanzanian bush. Every reef, recipe and ranger trail comes with a story you won't find in a guidebook.

group_or_private.title: Group or private
group_or_private.text: Shared dhow days with new friends, or a private tour, package or safari built around just your group. Same care, your pace.

handled.title: Everything handled
handled.text: Airport pickup, hotel transfers, dietary needs, last-minute changes. Message us and it's already sorted.

excursions.title: Excursions crafted by locals
excursions.lead: Hand-built island days with traditional boats, clear reefs, spice farms, and guides who grew up on these shores.

modes.ocean_text: Dhow sailing, sandbanks, snorkeling, dolphins, and reef days.
modes.culture_text: Stone Town, spice farms, Swahili food, dhow-building, and village visits.
modes.nature_text: Jozani forest, tortoises, mangroves, turtles, and family-friendly wildlife stops.

safaris.title: {{count}} safari starting points
safaris.lead: Choose a classic northern route, a southern wilderness fly-in, a quick safari from Zanzibar, or a special-interest trip for photography, family, culture, luxury, birds, chimps, and migration seasons.

modes.classic_text: Serengeti, Ngorongoro, Tarangire, Nyerere, Ruaha, Mahale and Katavi.
modes.fly_in_text: Short safaris from Zanzibar for guests already on the island.
modes.specialists_text: Honeymoon, family, photography, walking, birding, and bush-to-beach styles.

tarangire-day-trip.label: Quick safari
tarangire-day-trip.text: Fly in for a fast wildlife day from Zanzibar, with park fees, lunch, guide, and game drive handled.

serengeti-migration.label: Migration safari
serengeti-migration.text: A strong-selling Serengeti route for migration plains, big cats, camps, meals, and guided game drives.

nyerere-selous.label: Southern circuit
nyerere-selous.text: A wilder fly-in route with boat safari, walking safari, luxury camp, guide, and domestic flights.

packages.title: {{count}} packages — safari, Zanzibar, honeymoon, family & culture
packages.lead: Start with a researched package, then let us adjust the route, hotel level, flights, excursions, and pace around your dates.
packages.note: The full package page includes honeymoon, family, fly-in safari, migration, Kilimanjaro, marine, culture, digital nomad, and luxury options.

transfers.title: Arrive smoothly, before the trip even begins.
transfers.lead: Airport meet & greet, private AC vehicles, flight tracking, luggage help, and VIP arrival options across Zanzibar.

map.title: Zanzibar & Tanzania at a glance
map.lead: One country, two worlds. The island gives you Stone Town's heritage, dhows on the reef, beaches, culture, and ocean days. Cross to the mainland for northern icons, southern wilderness, western chimp routes, quick fly-ins, mountain days, and cultural stops.

gallery.title: Moments from shore to safari
gallery.lead: A wider look at Zanzibar and Tanzania: dhows, old streets, forest, spice farms, sandbanks, and mainland wildlife.

isa.quote: You can walk the mangroves and enjoy the best sunset ever. Thanks to the team — the warmth and care were unreal.

arturo.quote: Our guide was knowledgeable, upbeat and friendly. The dhow was beautiful, the lagoon unforgettable. Booked again before leaving.

coleman.quote: We smelled every spice, asked a hundred questions, and the team went above and beyond to answer them all. Best day of our trip.

newsletter.title: Sea stories and sunsets, every month
newsletter.description: Hand-written notes from the team — trip openings, shoulder-season deals, and the occasional spice recipe. One email a month. Never anything else.
newsletter.error: That did not go through. Please try again in a moment.
